supported_devices: Gavita e-Series fixtures: up to 40 single-bus or 500 repeater-bus; plus up to 2 EC fans (0-10V) with intelligent PID control
port_types: RJ9 (4P4C) main port, 3.5mm probe jack (T1 temp sensor), 0-10V EC fan control output, cage clamp alarm NO, cage clamp alarm NC, 15V DC power input
compatible_ec_fans: 0-10V EC fans, max 2; compatible with Gavita FB1 Fan Balancer accessory; fan speed range 10-100%
compatible_lights: Gavita e-Series, Digistar e-Series, Pro Line e-Series Slim, CMH e-Series, Gavita LEDs
supported_manufacturer_series: e-Series, Digistar e-Series, Pro Line e-Series Slim, CMH e-Series, LED series
recommended_use_note: Single grow room requiring integrated light and EC fan control; controls up to 40 HID ballasts/fixtures plus up to 2 EC fans with temperature-based PID fan regulation; replaces separate timer, contactor, and fan controller
uvp_notes: 375€ at Lichtblick Frankfurt (GAV-EL1FG2); 449€ at Culture Indoor EU; price variation across retailers; 449€ used as higher-end estimate
notes: Gen 2 multi-function controller (GAV-EL1FG2); adds 0-10V EC fan control with intelligent PID self-learning algorithm to standard EL1 Gen 2 capabilities; fan control range 10–100%, max 2 EC fans; alarm contacts NO/NC; 2-line green OLED display; 15V DC adapter; anodized aluminum housing; light dimming range 50–115%; compatible with Gavita EFM1 External Fan Module and FB1 Fan Balancer accessories; weight 0.2kg per retailer listing (unconfirmed)
